# Claude Code — Instalador y Guía Completa (Claude-Installer)

> Guía paso a paso y scripts para instalar Claude Code (CLI de Anthropic) en Linux, macOS y Windows sin permisos de administrador. Binario autocontenido, sin Node.js.

## Páginas (ES)
- https://varelaia.github.io/Claude-Installer/faq/
- https://varelaia.github.io/Claude-Installer/
- https://varelaia.github.io/Claude-Installer/linux/
- https://varelaia.github.io/Claude-Installer/macos/
- https://varelaia.github.io/Claude-Installer/troubleshooting/
- https://varelaia.github.io/Claude-Installer/windows/

## Pages (EN)
- https://varelaia.github.io/Claude-Installer/en/faq/
- https://varelaia.github.io/Claude-Installer/en/
- https://varelaia.github.io/Claude-Installer/en/linux/
- https://varelaia.github.io/Claude-Installer/en/macos/
- https://varelaia.github.io/Claude-Installer/en/troubleshooting/
- https://varelaia.github.io/Claude-Installer/en/windows/
